introduction: Based in La Plata, Province of Buenos Aires, Argentina. I have a results-oriented, proactive and collaborative profile, I like to be part of ambitious teams accompanied by great learning. "Always learning!" I try to acquire new knowledge every day to become a complete developer.
modal_description: Extended project information, technologies used, links, screenshots, etc.
contact_me_1: Do you have an idea, an ongoing project, or need technical support? I'm open to new opportunities, collaborations, and inquiries related to development and technology.
contact_me_2: Feel free to reach out using the contact form and briefly describe your needs. I'll get back to you shortly so we can discuss how to move forward.
